mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, c.code AS course_code, u.real_name AS teacher_name, c.semester, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) AS enrolled_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) AS assignment_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) - (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id)) AS unsubmitted_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id AND sub.is_late = 1) AS late_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id AND sub.is_late = 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a2 INNER JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = a2.id WHERE a2.course_id = c.id), 0), 1) AS late_rate, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id), 1) AS average_score, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id) AS lowest_score, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id AND g.score >= 60) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id), 0), 1) AS pass_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission s ON g.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN assignment a3 ON s.assignment_id = a3.id WHERE a3.course_id = c.id) AS graded_count FROM course c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId}

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id) AS enrolled_course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)) AS total_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS graded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id), 1) AS overall_average, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS lowest_score, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score >= 60) AS pass_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score < 60) AS fail_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score >= 60) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id), 0), 1) AS pass_rate FROM user stu WHERE stu.role = 'STUDENT'
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY overall_average DESC

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id) AS enrolled_course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)) AS total_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS graded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id), 1) AS overall_average, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS lowest_score, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score >= 60) AS pass_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score < 60) AS fail_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND g.score >= 60) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id), 0), 1) AS pass_rate FROM user stu WHERE stu.id = #{studentId}

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id) AS enrolled_course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)) AS total_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) AS graded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id)), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId}), 1) AS overall_average, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId}) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId}) AS lowest_score, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId} AND g.score >= 60) AS pass_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId} AND g.score < 60) AS fail_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId} AND g.score >= 60) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a4 ON sub.assignment_id = a4.id WHERE sub.student_id = stu.id AND a4.course_id = #{courseId}), 0), 1) AS pass_rate FROM user stu INNER JOIN course_student cs ON cs.student_id = stu.id WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY overall_average DESC

SELECT a.id AS assignment_id, a.title AS assignment_title, a.deadline, a.max_score, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id) AS total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id)) AS unsubmitted_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 0) AS on_time_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 1) AS late_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 0), 1) AS late_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS graded_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS ungraded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 0), 1) AS grading_progress, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 1) AS average_score, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS lowest_score FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE a.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS assignment_id, a.title AS assignment_title, a.deadline, a.max_score, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id) AS total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id)) AS unsubmitted_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = a.course_id), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 0) AS on_time_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 1) AS late_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id AND sub.is_late = 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 0), 1) AS late_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS graded_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS ungraded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 0), 1) AS grading_progress, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id), 1) AS average_score, (SELECT MAX(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS highest_score, (SELECT MIN(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.assignment_id = a.id) AS lowest_score FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{assignmentId}

SELECT t.id AS teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.teacher_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_student cs ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS assignment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS total_submissions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id AND sub.is_late = 1) AS total_late_submissions, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id AND sub.is_late = 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 0), 1) AS late_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS graded_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS pending_grading_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 0), 1) AS grading_progress, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 1) AS average_score_given FROM user t WHERE t.role = 'TEACHER' AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY course_count DESC

SELECT t.id AS teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.teacher_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_student cs ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS assignment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS total_submissions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id AND sub.is_late = 1) AS total_late_submissions, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id AND sub.is_late = 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 0), 1) AS late_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS graded_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS pending_grading_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 0), 1) AS grading_progress, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id), 1) AS average_score_given FROM user t WHERE t.id = #{teacherId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'STUDENT') AS student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'TEACHER') AS teacher_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment) AS assignment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission) AS submission_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade) AS graded_count, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment), 0), 1) AS submission_rate, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g WHERE g.score >= 60) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade), 0), 1) AS pass_rate FROM DUAL

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId})) AS total_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = #{studentId}) AS graded_count, ROUND((SELECT AVG(g.score) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = #{studentId}), 1) AS average_score FROM DUAL

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS assignment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade g INNER JOIN submission sub ON g.submission_id = sub.id INNER JOIN assignment a ON sub.assignment_id = a.id INNER JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS pending_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_student cs ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS student_count FROM DUAL
